rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
generic_rules: AGREE expressions may only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
Use exact names from the AADL model index for all identifiers in AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax within AGREE annex blocks
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: Component type annexes vs implementation annexes
